clusters.product_fit_rationale: This cluster fits our supported features list because it involves automated GST calculation, GSTIN auto validation, and real-time GSTIN lookup verification, all of which are supported by our product capabilities such as auto_gst_calculation and gstin_auto_fetch.
keywords: automated GST calculation API for SaaS
GST compliance automation for Indian businesses

clusters.product_fit_rationale: This cluster fits our supported features list because it involves GSTR-1 report export, which is supported by our product capability gstr1_reporting_exports.

Recurring invoicing API for SaaS companies
Billing schedule optimization for recurring revenue
